Menu.title: Menu
Menu.description: A navigation menu and content section for teacher administration

id.description: Unique identifier for the menu, hyphenated

title.description: The title or display name for the button

content.description: The custom HTML or naskah content

reloadUrl.description: Optional direct frame URL / Google Drive embed

isActive.description: Whether the menu is visible to teachers

order.description: Sort order placement of the menu

/menus/{menuId}.description: Collection of custom curriculum and administration menus
